text: See the failure the way systemd sees it: `systemctl status webapp` (note the state — activating/auto-restart means a crash loop) and then the actual error: `journalctl -u webapp -n 20 --no-pager`.
The log line `FATAL: LISTEN_PORT must be a number, got: 'eighty'` points straight at the config. Look at `/etc/webapp/webapp.conf`.
Set a valid numeric port: `sudo sed -i 's/^LISTEN_PORT=.*/LISTEN_PORT=8080/' /etc/webapp/webapp.conf`, then `sudo systemctl restart webapp` and confirm with `systemctl status webapp`.
